summary: The original representative #45862 is already closed as implemented on current main, and the live open items split into separate subfamilies rather than one dedupe-closeable canonical path. No close, merge, or fix PR action is planned. Open filesystem-root PRs #43565 and #52951 stay open as related follow-up work; open dmPolicy PR #55726 stays open while linked security issue #55612 is routed to central security handling; #56923 is already closed after replacement #73915 merged.
